name: List

leading.note: All items in a list must use the same leading element type

color_dot.note: Supplements headline. Shown as neutral skeleton in loading state.

usage_rules.rule: All items must have consistent structure
usage_rules.detail: All list items within one list must be structured the same way. Do not mix items with icons and items without icons, or items with images and items without.
Use the List component for simple, similar data. For complex structured data with multiple columns, use Table instead.
Order items in a logical way meaningful to the user. New items (e.g. comments) are added at the bottom.

confidence_blockers: If ticket mixes leading element types (some items with icons, some without), flag as usage_rule violation.
If ticket represents complex multi-column data in a list, suggest Table instead.

embedding_text: List component. Simple similar data items. Each item has headline body and optional leading icon image avatar progress circle. All items must have consistent structure. Divider between items. Skeleton loading state. Use Table for complex data not List.
